title: LifeSmart 485 Converter LS080HV
description:
Work with smart station, the RS485 specifies only the electrical characteristics of the receiving and sending ends and does not specify or recommend any data protocols.The RS485 has a maximum data transfer rate of 35Mbps at 10 m and 100Kbps at 1200m,Strong anti-jamming ability,The transmission distance is long, and there are many support nodes
